title: Impact of clinical pharmacist integration on diabetes management: a prospective cohort.
author: Kutluay NB Bektay MY Sumbul-Sekerci B Sekerci A Izzettin FV

Introduction

Diabetes is a chronic disease with increasing prevalence. There is growing evidence pharmacist can contribute to clinical outcomes. This study aims to evaluate
